channel.title: AI-Workflow on Junho Lee
channel.description: Recent content in AI-Workflow on Junho Lee

item.title: Thinking Like an Agent Conductor in the AI Era
item.description: Even after adopting agents, if the work structure itself does not change, productivity does not scale. Reid Hoffman’s conductor strategy starts by breaking that illusion.

item.title: Building an Organic AI Collaboration Flow from Planning to Visualization
item.description: How assigning Claude, Perplexity, and NotebookLM to distinct stages of lecture planning changes the workflow. The point is not using more tools but knowing which tool fits which stage.
